company.name: NextECO Solutions
company.mission: To provide high-performance, secure, and privacy-respecting software that empowers users while minimizing digital footprints.
company.about: NextECO Solutions is a leading software development firm dedicated to creating a holistic ecosystem of tools for modern professionals. We believe that technology should be powerful yet simple, secure yet accessible. Our suite of 5+ products is designed with a core focus on performance, security, and sustainability.

contact.address: 123 Tech Lane, Suite 456, Innovation City, CA 94025

values.title: Security First
values.description: Every line of code is written with security as the top priority, ensuring your data remains yours.

values.title: Performance Driven
values.description: Our apps are optimized for speed and efficiency, saving you time and system resources.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We strive to reduce digital waste through efficient algorithms and streamlined workflows.

faqs.question: Is NextECO software free to use?
faqs.answer: Most of our core products offer a fully functional free tier with essential features. For advanced enterprise-grade optimization and security, we offer premium licenses.

faqs.question: Is my data safe with NextECO?
faqs.answer: Yes. We follow a 'Privacy First' philosophy. Our software, like EcoVault and EcoMail, uses zero-knowledge encryption, meaning only you have the keys to your data.

faqs.question: Do you support older versions of Windows and Android?
faqs.answer: We strive for maximum compatibility. Most of our apps support Windows 10/11 and Android 8.0 (Oreo) or higher.

faqs.question: How do I verify the integrity of my download?
faqs.answer: Every download comes with a SHA256 checksum. You can verify this using the copy button on the product page and a hash verification tool on your device.

faqs.question: How often are the apps updated?
faqs.answer: We release security patches and performance optimizations every 2-4 weeks. Major feature updates are released quarterly.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.content:
# Documentation

Welcome to the NextECO Solutions documentation. Here you will find guides and technical details for all our products.

## Getting Started
To get started with any of our tools, simply download the installer for your platform and follow the on-screen instructions.

security-policy.title: Security Policy
security-policy.content:
# Security Policy

At NextECO Solutions, security is not an afterthought—it's the foundation of everything we build.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.content:
# Privacy Policy

Your privacy is our priority. We do not sell your data.
